'''Guba birds''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Bird/Legends|birds]]. They made their nests on the [[Mountain/Legends|mountains]] of the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]].

The young [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka]] once ordered her close friends to help her take [[Jinjang berry|jinjang berries]] to some baby guba birds nested on the top of a mountain.

{{Creature-stub}}

*{{Ewoks|Battle for the Sunstar}} {{1st}}
